g.text: This license has a Oracle copyright notice. It is the same license as
BSD-3-Clause-No-Nuclear-License, except it has a different entire disclaimer
clause that is the same as BSD-3-Clause.
These licenses lack important but nonessential elements of permissive open
software licenses or impose additional requirements or restrictions, such as
BSD-style prohibitions against endorsement and promotion.
this is a minor variation on similar licenses by Sun and Oracle.
